SDK command execution

features.title: Share functionality for shuv.ai infrastructure
features.author: fork
features.description: Enable /share functionality for shuvcode by deploying rebranded share infrastructure to share.shuv.ai. Includes CLI defaults, import command dual-API support, and enterprise package rebranding.

criticalCode.description: Rebranded share page header with Latitudes-Dev/shuvcode GitHub link and static OG image
Short URL redirect API route /s/{id} to /share/{id} with HTTP 301
Default share URL changed to share.shuv.ai with SHUVCODE_SHARE_URL env var support
Share base URLs updated to share.shuv.ai / share.dev.shuv.ai
Dual API format support for legacy opencode.ai and enterprise shuv.ai URLs
SST deployment config for share service to shuv.ai domain
Share deployment step in CI workflow
HTML document title changed to shuvcode
Web app manifest name changed to shuvcode
